title: Recordable A5 Birthday Audio Cards. Birthday Candles Cover - AB2204. 30 second audio. Pulley activated. Immediate dispatch
features: PERSONALISED MESSAGES: Record up to 30 seconds of audio directly onto each card for a special personalised gift.
QUALITY CARD STOCK: High quality A5 300gsm premium card for durable use. Envelope included, blank for your own decoration.

EASY OPERATION: Simply open the card and the audio message will play, no batteries required. To record: press the red button, activate by opening the card. Messages can be re-recorded and are preserved forever.
PERFECT BIRTHDAY GIFT: Recipients will love this unique audio personalised audio card.
RECORD YOUR OWN CARDS are unique and memorable cards for crafts or gifting. Guaranteed more than 200 plays.
description: Happy Birthday Record Your Own Greeting Cards! Gift friends and family a unique voice message or musical surprise on their special day. 'Birthday Candles' Greeting Card with 30 seconds personalised audio and everything you need to record included, just add your own music or voice message. Blank inside. Finished size A5 with white envelope. Recordable greeting cards come with easy to follow instructions. Pull tab and hold red button for 30 seconds to record. Card will beep at start and end of recording. Activate by opening card. Audio can be re-recorded as often as you like. Battery will last for at least 200 plays. Inclusive greeting cards for blind or visually impaired loved ones.
